name: Unnamed
alt: A group of Einasvel staring at the camera while pausing during different activities. They are in a field of inhabited Paupau trees on a bright day.

name: Ooheihaudeih
alt: An Ooheihaudeih. A blue creature with a mouse-like body, two red tails, and large black horns.

name: Okshlihd Icon
alt: A drawing of a flying ok°s/hl/ihd.

name: Idauhl Alphabet
alt: The alphabet for a grid-like language that uses dashes and lines, and a demonstration of how the language looks when carved into a tree.

name: Map of Mk'mih'oh
alt: A Map of Mikimoh with named continents and visible lines around the tropics.

name: Enausq'/hl/ Number System
alt: The writing structure for numbers that uses different numbers of lines on different parts of a base form to signify a number.

name: OC's in the Living Room
alt: A drawing of two characters (Hubert and Tobias) sitting on a couch in their living room while a young girl (Eleanor) marches through the front door, soaked and carrying a large stick.

name: Water Eater (Adult)
alt: Drawing of a Water-Eater, a yellow hippo-like creature with two additional small arms on the front and a large brightly colored tail.

name: Campfire
alt: An Einasvel (Maukkohd), an Oele'in (Ehlaunoh), and a Water-Eater relaxing around a fire.

name: Food Fight
alt: Two Einasvel fighting over a piece of fish. The one in front is in a threatening attack position. A map of the world is behind them.
